title: Tommee Tippee Twist & Click Nappy Bin Refills, Pack of 3, each 10.5 metres, Multilayer, Antibacterial* Film, Designed to Slot into Your Existing Twist & Click Nappy Bin Cassette (3 X 10.5m)
features: Less plastic means less waste: You can now reuse your empty Twist & Click cassette again and again, for less mess, less smells and less waste​
Guaranteed odour and germ protection*: Every dirty nappy is individually wrapped, trapping unpleasant odours and killing harmful germs​
Long-lasting: Each refill holds 100+ nappies*** and our film is up to 50% longer than pre-measured inserts from other manufacturers ​
Twist & Click compatible: Our refills are specifically designed to work with the Twist & Click nappy bin cassettes​
The No.1 Nappy Disposal System in Europe: Parents across Europe love our Twist & Click nappy bins and refills, they block odours and keep your home tidy and smelling fresh ​
Space-saving: Compact packaging is easy to store in your cupboard until needed
description: Designed to slot into your existing Twist & Click nappy bin cassette. With multilayer, antibacterial* film that kills germs and helps trap bad odours. To refill your existing Twist & Click cassette, follow these simple steps: 1. Remove white sleeves. 2. Find the middle. 3. Slot into cassette. 4. Click top ring back into place. • Designed to refill your empty Twist & Click film cassettes • Guaranteed protection against odours and germs* • Each refill holds 100+ nappies** • Our film is 50% longer than pre-measured inserts from other manufacturers*** • Refill and reuse cassette to reduce plastic waste • No.1 nappy disposal system in Europe† • Compact, space-saving packaging *Film is antibacterial protected to inhibit bacterial growth by up to 99%. Antibacterial protection is present in the film, and not the other components of this product. Film is treated with a silver based biocide, tested to ISO 22196:2011. Please use biocides responsibly. **Based on using size 1 nappies and length of film. Please note that all babies are unique and experiences may differ ***According to internal testing, comparing lengths of 8 pre-measured inserts, June 2023. To verify please visit the Amazon product page. †Edge Platform Value Sales (combined sales of T&C bin, XL bin and cassettes across DE, FR, IT, ES), 52wks to 7 Jun ‘24.
